title: Avoid using inplace operations when modifying a Pandas DataFrame
description: Using inplace operations on a Pandas DataFrame can lead to unexpected results, confusion, and errors when working with complex data manipulation.
message: Avoid using inplace operations on a Pandas DataFrame.
recommendation: Use the `.loc` or `.iloc` methods to select rows and columns before applying changes.

compliant.description: Assign result to a new DataFrame.

why_is_this_an_issue: Inplace operations can lead to unintended side effects, making the code harder to understand, debug, and maintain.
how_to_fix: Use `.loc` or `.iloc` to select rows and columns before applying changes.

metadata.title: Avoid using inplace operations when modifying a Pandas DataFrame
